recommended_evidence_quality_note.ARC-062_MECH-309: V3-EXQ-543h non_contributory (autopsy 2026-05-18). Gated policy collapsed to inert on all gated arms/3 seeds (n_inert=3, probe_gate failed); repro_543g_signature is sign-only and misfired the grid into branch (b). Correct branch (c): non_contributory all claims. Cross-machine replication (Sec.7b): the 543g config is near-bifurcation fragile -- ACTIVE host-A (_144716Z), INERT cloud-3 (_191536Z) + cloud-4. 543g _144716Z 'weakens ARC-062' is a 1/3 minority-basin artifact; 543g overall non_contributory. ARC-062 has zero reliable contributory trained-policy evidence; pending_retest_after_substrate.
recommended_evidence_quality_note.INV-074_MECH-334: V3-EXQ-543h does NOT weaken INV-074 or MECH-334 (autopsy 2026-05-18, correcting the manifest's branch-(b) per_claim weakens). Crystallization freezes head_0/head_1/discriminator; the gated policy was inert before the closure fired, so the PNN/Lynx1/NgR1-analog crystallization mechanism was never exercised. Missing prerequisite (functional differentiated GatedPolicy = MECH-333/INV-074), not claim pressure. evidence_direction = non_contributory; pending_retest_after_substrate.
recommended_evidence_quality_note.supersession_indexer: Do NOT honor V3-EXQ-543h supersedes: V3-EXQ-543g. Cross-machine: 543g config near-bifurcation fragile (ACTIVE host-A _144716Z; INERT cloud-3 _191536Z + cloud-4 543h xtal-OFF). _144716Z 'weakens' = 1/3 minority basin -> treat 543g overall non_contributory for ARC-062; do not weight the 'weakens'. No reliable interim ARC-062 evidence. V3-EXQ-543i supersedes BOTH after substrate stabilisation.
